creator: tobez@tobez.org
text:
Would you please fix pkg-plist?

# make deinstall
===>  Deinstalling for p5-POE-0.15
pkg_delete: file `/usr/local/lib/perl5/site_perl/5.6.0/Devel/Null.pm' doesn't really exist
pkg_delete: file `/usr/local/lib/perl5/site_perl/5.6.0/Devel/Trace.pm' doesn't really exist
pkg_delete: file `/usr/local/lib/perl5/site_perl/5.6.0/MyOtherFreezer.pm' doesn't really exist
pkg_delete: file `/usr/local/lib/perl5/site_perl/5.6.0/TestSetup.pm' doesn't really exist
pkg_delete: file `/usr/local/lib/perl5/site_perl/5.6.0/coverage.perl' doesn't really exist
pkg_delete: file `/usr/local/lib/perl5/site_perl/5.6.0/deptest.perl' doesn't really exist
pkg_delete: couldn't entirely delete package (perhaps the packing list is incorrectly specified?)

> >Synopsis:       Update port: p5-POE-0.15

Cheers,
+Anton.
-- 
May the tuna salad be with you.
